title: post api v1 auth login with valid credentials
description: Test POST /api/v1/Auth/login with valid user credentials to verify successful authentication, receiving a 200 status, a JWT access token in the response body, and a secure HTTP-Only refresh token cookie set.

title: post api v1 auth register with valid new user
description: Test POST /api/v1/Auth/register with a valid new user payload to verify user creation, receiving a 201 Created response with the created user id, and subsequent login with these credentials returns a 200 with JWT token.

title: get api v1 auth me with valid token
description: Test GET /api/v1/Auth/me with a valid Authorization Bearer token to verify retrieval of the current authenticated user details with a 200 response.

title: get api v1 menu sidebar with valid authorization
description: Test GET /api/v1/Menu/sidebar with a valid Authorization Bearer token to verify the response returns a 200 status and sidebar menu JSON filtered by the user's roles and permissions.

title: get api v1 menu all with admin authorization
description: Test GET /api/v1/Menu/all with a valid admin Authorization Bearer token to verify the response returns a 200 status and the full list of menus for administrative management and export.

title: get api v1 usermanagement users with admin authorization
description: Test GET /api/v1/UserManagement/users with a valid admin Authorization Bearer token to verify the response returns a 200 status with a paged list of users including role and menu assignment metadata.

title: get api v1 audit with valid filters and admin authorization
description: Test GET /api/v1/Audit with valid start and end date filters and a valid admin Authorization Bearer token to verify the response returns a 200 status with filtered audit entries including IP address, user-agent, action, and timestamps.
